title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Bethpage, NY | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Bethpage, Long Island. Humane bat extraction, cleanup, and permanent exclusion. Licensed experts serving Bethpage homes and businesses.
intro: Bats in your Bethpage attic or commercial property require immediate professional attention for safe, humane removal. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout Bethpage and surrounding Long Island communities, ensuring your property is bat-free and protected against re-entry. Our licensed technicians use proven exclusion methods that comply with all New York wildlife regulations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of bat removal experience to Bethpage properties, combining humane wildlife practices with permanent exclusion solutions. Our team is fully licensed, insured, and trained in the latest bat exclusion techniques, providing same-day emergency services and guaranteed results for Long Island homeowners and businesses.
localContext: Bethpage's mix of mid-century ranch homes, historic properties near Bethpage State Park, and commercial buildings along Hempstead Turnpike often provide ideal roosting spaces for bats in attics, soffits, and wall voids. The tree-lined residential neighborhoods and proximity to wooded areas make bat encounters increasingly common, requiring professional exclusion to protect both the property and these protected species.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Bethpage?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Bethpage typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the colony size, entry point locations, building height, and extent of exclusion work needed. This includes humane bat removal, complete exclusion installation, cleanup, and sanitization of affected areas.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in Bethpage, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bat removal in New York must follow strict regulations. Bats are protected species and can only be excluded during specific times of year (typically avoiding maternity season from May 1 to August 15). Our licensed professionals ensure all bat removal complies with New York State Department of Environmental Conservation guidelines.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my Bethpage home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, small dark droppings (guano) in attics or near entry points, brown staining around soffits or vents, and seeing bats flying around your property at twilight. Bethpage homeowners often discover bats in attics, behind shutters, or in chimney spaces.

faqs.question: What does bat exclusion involve?
faqs.answer: Bat exclusion involves a thorough inspection to identify all entry points, installation of one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but not return, sealing of all potential entry points with durable materials, attic cleanup and decontamination, and insulation replacement if necessary. We provide warranties on our exclusion work to ensure bats don't return to your Bethpage property.
